title: SensitivityAndOwnershipRegistries
description: Structured registry mapping high-volatility sensitivity zones and institutional ownership/interface nodes.

language.trigger_vectors: Imposing non-state language options; translating state textbooks poorly; neglecting regional tribal dialects.
language.operational_guardrail: Dynamic localization layer; strict metadata checks preventing language cross-contamination.

history_curriculum.trigger_vectors: Altering historical timelines; neglecting regional state heroes; modifying central history curriculum chapters.
history_curriculum.operational_guardrail: Static, department-approved RAG reference blocks; zero dynamic generation for sensitive historical queries.

tribal_education.trigger_vectors: Neglecting tribal dialect instruction; forcing standardized urban examples on rural forest-dwelling communities.
tribal_education.operational_guardrail: Support for localized content templates; integration of regional contexts.

minority_education.trigger_vectors: Altering syllabus details regarding minority rights; neglecting minority language textbook editions (e.g. Urdu medium textbooks of Balbharati).
minority_education.operational_guardrail: Strict verification of all translated textbook volumes; exact alignment with official board-approved prints.

board_examinations.trigger_vectors: Paper leaks; grading system errors; sudden alterations in syllabus coverage weeks before the final board exams.
board_examinations.operational_guardrail: Strict boundary locks on exam prep materials; secure, multi-layer verified grading engines.

child_data.trigger_vectors: Leak of student database; commercial profiling of minor children; unauthorized sharing of learning metrics with marketing vendors.
child_data.operational_guardrail: Parent consent verification hooks; strict multi-tenant SQLite data isolation.

AI_in_education.trigger_vectors: AI tutor returning inaccurate information; generative AI hallucinating sensitive political responses; voice biometric data leaks.
AI_in_education.operational_guardrail: Mandatory RAG grounding; rigid content filtering; offline fallbacks with explicit system warnings.

public_private_education_models.trigger_vectors: Perceived privatization of public school infrastructure; charging minor students fees for premium digital features.
public_private_education_models.operational_guardrail: Ensure all public school platform assets are permanently free and state-hosted; zero paywalls.

content_governance.trigger_vectors: Allowing content upload by unverified users; silent alteration of textbook chunks inside the vector store.
content_governance.operational_guardrail: Immutable database schemas; cryptographic hash verification of vector store collections.

who_emits.entity: Telemetry engines, student chatbot, active school servers.
who_emits.ambiguity_zones: Ownership of anonymous interaction data under DPDP.
who_emits.ownership_collisions: Software provider claiming data usage rights vs government sovereign ownership.
who_emits.dependency_chains: Student action -> Telemetry client -> State database aggregator.

who_governs.entity: School Education Department, MSCERT, Board of Education.
who_governs.ambiguity_zones: Delimitation of guidelines vs operational rules.
who_governs.ownership_collisions: MSCERT claiming curriculum authority vs Balbharati publishing changes.
who_governs.dependency_chains: NEP guidelines -> MSCERT SCF framework -> Balbharati printed textbooks.

who_procures.ambiguity_zones: Software licenses procurement vs hardware distribution contracts.
who_procures.ownership_collisions: MPSP selecting specific SIs vs MahaIT central cloud mandates.
who_procures.dependency_chains: State budget release -> MPSP RFP tender -> SI vendor empanelment.

who_deploys.entity: Winning System Integrator (SI) vendor, district collectors, school principals.
who_deploys.ambiguity_zones: Responsibility for school-level network setup and cabling.
who_deploys.ownership_collisions: SI vendor claiming deployment complete vs principal rejecting broken tablet shipments.
who_deploys.dependency_chains: SI central delivery -> District warehouse -> School inventory register.

who_observes.entity: District Education Inspectors, state dashboards, Union Ministry monitoring cells.
who_observes.ambiguity_zones: Telemetry data access permissions under privacy laws.
who_observes.ownership_collisions: Central ministry demanding child-level progress scores vs state board blocking access to maintain data sovereignty.
who_observes.dependency_chains: School test entries -> State dashboard -> Central aggregate telemetry.

who_trains.ambiguity_zones: Responsibility for technical platform training vs standard pedagogical training.
who_trains.ownership_collisions: MSCERT trainer teaching curriculum changes vs technical provider explaining dashboard clicks.
who_trains.dependency_chains: State training guidelines -> BEO training camps -> Local teacher sessions.

who_approves.entity: Education Secretary, Cabinet Ministers, Board Chairpersons.
who_approves.ambiguity_zones: Emergency bypass approvals vs formal committee reviews.
who_approves.ownership_collisions: Board chairman approving syllabus adjustments vs Ministry secretary demanding revisions.
who_approves.dependency_chains: Committee recommendation -> Secretary sign-off -> Ministerial decree.

who_audits.entity: Comptroller & Auditor General (CAG), third-party security auditors, state vigilance wings.
who_audits.ambiguity_zones: Technical code audits vs physical inventory verification audits.
who_audits.ownership_collisions: External auditor raising security flags vs platform SI vendor dismissing warnings to avoid timeline penalties.
who_audits.dependency_chains: Auditor query -> Platform response logs -> Final compliance scorecard.

who_operationalises.entity: School teachers, student learners, local system administrators.
who_operationalises.ambiguity_zones: Daily password resets and technical field troubleshooting.
who_operationalises.ownership_collisions: Teacher demanding immediate IT help vs remote SI vendor refusing on-site support.
who_operationalises.dependency_chains: User interface click -> Local host server database write -> State cloud synchronization.
